description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy-dists job in the deploy stage using the docker:git image and the docker:dind service. The job runs before_script commands: docker info, docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY, apk add make, and chmod +x ./ci/*. Then it executes ./ci/build.sh as its main script, and after_script runs ./ci/test.sh followed by ./ci/deploy.sh. The job is limited to tags matching the regex /^v[0-9]+[\.0-9]*[\.0-9]*$/ and does not define any caches or artifacts.
